items.title: Vitalik Buterin Wants Prediction Markets To Replace Fiat, Not Fuel Gambling
items.description: Vitalik Buterin urged prediction markets to shift from speculation to hedging amid increasing regulatory scrutiny in the U.S.

items.title: Solana Outperforms Bitcoin And Ethereum In Daily Gains, Pushes Co-Founder Yakovenko To The One Billion Club
items.description: Solana outperformed major tokens as investors reacted to shifting supply dynamics and renewed market momentum.

items.title: Elon Musk Keeps Word, Blocks ‘Spam’ Crypto Apps On X While Introducing Crypto Trading With Smart Cashtags
items.description: X will block crypto apps that incentivize spam via “claim your fees” models as it prepares to launch Smart Cashtags trading features.

items.title: ‘Mr. Wonderful’ Secures $2.8M Win In Defamation Fight With Ben Armstrong ‘BitBoy’
items.description: Kevin O’Leary has won a $2.8M defamation case against crypto influencer BitBoy over false murder claims and doxxing.
